374 GG0170R2_WHEEL_50_2_TURN_GOAL GG0170R2_WHEEL_50_2_TURN_GOAL GG0170R2 Discharge Goal Wheelchair 50 Feet Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal to be able to wheel 50 feet and make two turns. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's discharge goal
